---
title: "baranickkyra.github.io"
image: JpegProfile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kyra-baranick-a15028309/
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:baranickkyra@gmail.com
---

Hi! Welcome to my site.
